description: write an executor's report (dev_score / result / insight / branch_ref) into its node (Backpropagate, leaf)
rules: writes dev_score, result, insight, and branch_ref into the node's metadata
sets the node status to executed (unless overridden)
this is the leaf half of Backpropagate; abstracting the lesson upward is the separate propagate perk
usage: Set NODE (required); optional DEV_SCORE, RESULT, INSIGHT, BRANCH_REF carry the executor's returned evidence. Output: set_evidence.txt. If no run exists, a bootstrap run with a root + one child node (n1) is created first.
limitation: Records evidence verbatim — it neither runs the dev evaluator nor judges whether the result supports the hypothesis. NODE must reference an existing node id.

vars.RESULT: K=5 dossier aggregation recovers minority-rollout answers
vars.INSIGHT: Aggregation beats majority vote when correct answers are rare
